channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Xbox Games Showcase 2026: Share Your Favorites!
item.description: What were your favorite announcements from the Xbox Games Showcase 2026? Share your thoughts on titles like Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution.

item.title: Massive Bandai Namco Sale on Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: Bandai Namco's eShop sale features major discounts on titles like Tales of Berseria and Xillia Remastered, with many games at their lowest prices ever.

item.title: T-Mobile Users Enjoy Better Service Than Competitors
item.description: T-Mobile users currently experience superior service compared to AT&T and Verizon, but this advantage may not last long.

item.title: Activist Investors Push For FromSoftware Self-Publishing
item.description: Activist investors are urging FromSoftware to self-publish, claiming current publisher deals are unfavorable for the company.

item.title: Microsoft Updates Key Windows 11 Apps
item.description: Microsoft has rolled out significant updates for Windows 11's built-in apps, enhancing features for Paint, Clock, and Calculator.

item.title: Persona 6 Officially Announced by Atlus
item.description: Atlus has confirmed Persona 6, revealing details and speculation about its release timeline after years of anticipation.

item.title: Early Prime Day Garmin Watch Deals Available
item.description: Amazon has launched early Prime Day deals on Garmin watches, offering discounts up to 50% on popular models like Fenix and Venu.

item.title: New Xenomorph Image Revealed for Alien: Isolation 2
item.description: Creative Assembly has shared a new image of the Xenomorph, Stompy, from Alien: Isolation 2, showcasing its design.

item.title: Grow a Garden 2: Complete Plants and Seeds Guide
item.description: Discover the full list of plants and seeds available in Grow a Garden 2, including how to acquire them.

item.title: Insta360 Countersues DJI Over Patent Violations
item.description: Insta360 has filed a countersuit against DJI, claiming five patent violations related to gimbal and 360-degree camera technology.

item.title: Valor Mortis Delayed Ahead of Release
item.description: Valor Mortis has been delayed to avoid competition with major releases in September, following its initial announcement at the Xbox Games Showcase.
